历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024 (Science), the minimum ranking was approximately 104; in 2025 (Physics Category), the minimum ranking was approximately 104, with the two-year ranking completely flat, indicating that Peking University's admission rankings in the Ningxia Science group are highly stable. Peking University's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Ningxia: 8 in 2024 (Science), 13 in 2025 (Physics Category), and 12 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 1 student (-7.7%), a slight contraction, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University, 985/211/Double First-Class, ranked 2nd consecutively in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, a top national institution with an extremely high level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but as one of the top two universities in China, reputation fluctuations have limited impact on top-tier candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking: 3rd (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, and application attention continues to rise. Peking University has as many as 40 disciplines rated A- or above, with advantageous disciplines related to Physics Category including Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Biology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, and Electronic Information A+, etc., with discipline strength at the national top, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among majors related to Physics Category, Computer Science is highly recommended (high heat), Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended (high heat), and Mathematics/Statistics is recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is approximately 66,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 44,550, basically flat compared to 44,491 in 2025, indicating a stable competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 104, a slight enrollment reduction of 7.7% in 2026 (pressure for ranking to move forward), a flat total number of candidates, and high Douyin attention, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will move forward to approximately 96, with a range of 66-126. The enrollment reduction is the main driver for the ranking moving forward, and the continued high heat of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information further intensifies competition.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 66-126, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a stretch and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (around 66), one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Yuanpei. If the ranking is in the middle of the range (around 96), it is safer to focus on Tier 2. If the ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (126), it is recommended to use Tier 3 as a safety.

Over the past two years, the ranking has remained stable at around 50, with a slight decrease of 2 places in 2025 compared to 2024, showing minimal overall fluctuation. Peking University's enrollment plan in Ningxia for History Category: 9 in 2024 (Liberal Arts), 12 in 2025 (History Category), and 9 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 3 students (-25%), a significant contraction that intensifies competition and puts upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university, has consistently ranked 2nd in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it a top-tier national institution. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving campus safety, admission controversies, etc.), but as one of the top 2 universities in China, reputation fluctuations have limited impact on top candidates' willingness to apply. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, leading to continuously rising application attention. Peking University has as many as 40 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Law, Economics, and Chinese Language and Literature, showcasing top-tier academic strength that strongly attracts candidates.

预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 54, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 25% (upward pressure on rankings), stable total candidate numbers, and high Douyin attention, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will move up to approximately 44, with a range of 14-74. The enrollment reduction is the main driver of the ranking shift, and high Douyin attention further intensifies competition.
